2604.26326.title: Addressing Performance Saturation for LLM RL via Precise Entropy Curve Control
2604.26326.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has unlocked complex reasoning abilities in large language models (LLMs). However, most RL algorithms suffer from performance saturation, preventing further gains as RL training scales. This problem can be characterized by the collapse of entropy, a key diagnostic for exploration in RL. Existing attempts have tried to prevent entropy collapse through regularization or clipping, but their resulting entropy curves often exhibit instability in the long term, which hinders performance gains. In this paper, we introduce Entrocraft, a simple rejection-sampling approach that realizes any user-customized entropy schedule by biasing the advantage distributions. Entrocraft requires no objective regularization and is advantage-estimator-agnostic. Theoretically, we relate per-step entropy change to the advantage distribution under minimal assumptions, which explains the behavior of existing RL and entropy-preserving methods. Entrocraft also enables a systematic study of entropy schedules, where we find that linear annealing, which starts high and decays to a slightly lower target, performs best. Empirically, Entrocraft addresses performance saturation, significantly improving generalization, output diversity, and long-term training. It enables a 4B model to outperform an 8B baseline, sustains improvement for up to 4x longer before plateauing, and raises pass@K by 50% over the baseline.
2604.26326.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）在大型語言模型（LLMs）中解鎖了複雜的推理能力。<lb/>然而，大多數RL算法都面臨性能飽和的問題，這阻礙了隨著RL訓練擴展而進一步的增長。<lb/>這個問題可以通過熵的崩潰來表徵，熵是RL中探索的重要診斷指標。<lb/>現有的嘗試通過正則化或裁剪來防止熵崩潰，但其產生的熵曲線往往在長期內表現出不穩定性，這妨礙了性能的提升。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了Entrocraft，一種簡單的拒絕抽樣方法，通過偏置優勢分佈來實現任何用戶自定義的熵時間表。<lb/>Entrocraft不需要目標正則化，並且對優勢估計器不敏感。<lb/>從理論上講，我們在最小假設下將每步的熵變化與優勢分佈相關聯，這解釋了現有RL和保持熵的方法的行為。<lb/>Entrocraft還使熵時間表的系統性研究成為可能，我們發現線性退火，即從高開始並衰減到略低的目標，表現最佳。<lb/>在實證上，Entrocraft解決了性能飽和的問題，顯著提高了泛化能力、輸出多樣性和長期訓練。<lb/>它使一個4B模型的表現超過8B基準，在達到平臺之前持續改進長達4倍，並將pass@K提高了50%。
2604.26326.author: Bolian Li et.al.
2604.26326.authors: Bolian Li, Yifan Wang, Yi Ding, Anamika Lochab, Ananth Grama, Ruqi Zhang
